full: Ied-0-3 Coancansren, tnpilrutng ductal , Ws f5e0/> Pak Ste: breast, LO C505 ashy v CQ Site: beset Nie C509 Diagnosis 1. Left-sided ablated breast tissue with a poorly differentiated invasive ductal brea carcinoma measuring a good 55 mm with invasion of the lymph vessels and focally also of the blood vessels, infiltration of the overlying epidermis with very slight paracentral erosion and extension to the basal resection margin with infiltration of the resection margin. The nipple is tumor-free, including the lactiferous sinus and the other glandular tissue with a fibrocystic mammopathy.
